__comment: The win condition, HARDENED (v0.7.0): the four keystone corners are now the relics of the Void Signal bosses - Soul Star (Lich), Obsidian Heart (Obsidilith), Blazing Eye (Gauntlet), Void Thorn (Void Blossom) - plus witherite from the Netherite Monstrosity, ignitium from Ignis, 2x antimatter from the SPS, and a star from the Wither. Nine slots, seven boss kills, one ending.
